content.en:
"Ye Tian, I hope you can control time. "

The Frostless Lord said after throwing Ye Tian into the long river of time.

However, she was not very confident in whether Ye Tian would be able to control time this time, because even if she was about to control time, she couldn't stay in the long river of time for long, after all, Ye Tian's cultivation was still too low.

And she didn't have time to throw Ye Tian into the long river of time again and again, she didn't have this kung fu.

Everything depends on Ye Tian herself, she won't do such a thing again.

After all, she didn't owe Ye Tian anything.

......

In the midst of the long river of time.

Ye Tian entered here, and the turbulent power of time surged, and Ye Tian tried his best to control the time here to avoid time from harming him.

However, his body still couldn't stop collapsing.

Of course, the speed of the collapse was not very fast.

At this rate, Ye Tian could at least hold on for a while.

In other words, if it is other Transcendental Legendary Lords, even the top Transcendental Legendary Lords, the moment they enter the long river of time, they will turn into nothingness.

Even some half-step Legendary Realm Lords, if they don't have much control over time, they can't hold on to 140 hours for a while.

"Let's start enlightenment!"

Ye Tian stood in the long river of time and quietly comprehended the mystery of time.

He ignored the collapse of his body just to meditate for a while, and after a while, he immediately began to copy his body, a completely new body in its peak state.

Then, the body that was about to collapse was annihilated by the river of time, and the new copy body continued to meditate here.

In this way, Ye Tian relied on this method to comprehend the long river of time many times.

With the passage of time, the Frostless Lord thought that Ye Tian's clone had been annihilated in the long river of time, but the truth was different from what she had guessed, Ye Tian was still contemplating the mystery of time.

An eternal years later.

For the Legendary Lord, an eternal year is nothing, but for Ye Tian, this eternal year, his progress is too great.

this day.

The power of the long river of time flowed past Ye Tian's side, without hurting him in the slightest.

At this moment, he has mastered time, and he can swim in the long river of time at will.

Of course.

His strength is not strong, and he can't tear through the barriers of the long river of time, and he can't use the long river of time to rush like the lord of the legendary realm.

But Ye Tian controlled the time, and his strength soared rapidly.

Now, although he has not yet stepped into the realm of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, he can instantly kill any Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and even compared to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, he can fight with him, and he is not even weak.

That's the power of controlling time!

After controlling time, Ye Tian's replica body came out of the long river of time.

It's hard to get in, but it's easy to get out.

When Ye Tian came out of the long river of time, the frostless lord sensed it, and immediately looked through the space and saw Ye Tian.

"The breath of time!"

The Frostless Lord was surprised.

This was because Ye Tian had just controlled the time, and the aura had not completely dissipated, so she could see it

When Ye Tian is completely familiar with the ability to control time, he can be retracted and released freely, even if he is a peak Legendary Realm Lord, it is difficult to see Ye Tian's realm.

"How is this possible, he has entered the long river of time before, and he can't stay for long at all, even if he can stay for that long, it is impossible to completely control time in just one eternal year!"

The Frostless Lord was secretly surprised.

At this moment, she really realized what a demon was!

She is not a demon, nor is Lord Baiheng, and Ye Tian is the real demon.

From now on, Ye Tian will inevitably be able to reach the Legendary Realm Lord realm, and even become the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

If Ye Tian could condense the Supreme Legendary Body, then he would be almost invincible at the Legendary Realm Lord Level in the future.

Wow!

The Frostless Lord came to Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Lord, are you in control of time?

Lord Frostless asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian admitted.

At this time, the Frostless Lord said solemnly: "Ye Tian, you control time in the half-step transcendence realm Legendary Lord Realm. Because your body must stay in the Pure and Unholy Land, so that you can be safe. From now on, when you go out, you will go out as a doppelganger, and you will not be able to leave the body. In addition, I will apply to the high-level of the True Void Holy Land and strive to give you an eternal treasure that can cover the realm of cultivation. "

"Concealing the cultivation realm?"

Ye Tian was puzzled, there was such an eternal treasure.

After all, the Legendary Lord and the Legendary Realm Lord can see almost everything, and it is difficult for any secret art and treasure to cover the realm.

"Yes!" said the Frostless Lord, "It's just that it's almost useless, after all, once you fight, your strength will be exposed." But you are different, you control time, even if others know your combat power, they will think that you have reached the extreme of the Transcendental Legendary Lord, and the extreme of the Transcendental Legendary Lord, even if you control the time, will not cause such a big sensation. After all, the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is a half-step Legendary Realm Lord if he goes one step further, and he may be able to break through at any time, so the impact caused is not so great. "

"Thank you, Lord Frostless. "

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, the Frostless Lord went to inform the other Legendary Realm Lords.

There's really no holy place to start a meeting.

this day.

Lord of Frost, Lord of Longgu, Lord of Baiheng, Lord of Shocklight, Lord of Barren River, Lord of Teng Dove, Lord of Hemu......

One by one, the Lords of the Legendary Realm were present, but none of them knew what the purpose of the meeting was.

"Lord Frostless, what did you call us to do?"

Lord Dragongu asked.

The Frostless Lord spoke, "We really have another one in control of time in the Holy Land. "

"Who's the other one who controls time, the Infernal Lord? No, he's still some way from controlling time, and the Morrowind Lord isn't right, he's very low-key, but he's definitely not at the level of time control. But apart from the two of them, among the half-step Legendary Realm Lords, there is no one who is even better!" Lord Longgu wondered.

"It's not a half-step legendary realm!"

The Frostless Lord shook his head.

"What, it's not a half-step Legendary Realm? Could it be the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm!!"

Many Legendary Realm Lords were shocked. _
